worktree_state.content:
{
  "$schema": "https://e-menum.net/schemas/module-v1.json",
  "id": "loyalty",
  "name": "Loyalty Module",
  "version": "0.0.0",
  "status": "stub",
  "description": "Sadakat programı - puan sistemi, ödüller ve müşteri bağlılığı",

  "type": "feature",
  "category": "marketing",

  "author": {
    "name": "E-Menum Team",
    "email": "dev@e-menum.net"
  },

  "compatibility": {
    "platform": ">=1.0.0",
    "node": ">=20.0.0"
  },

  "dependencies": {
    "modules": ["auth", "organization", "order"],
    "optional": ["notification", "campaign"]
  },

  "provides": {
    "services": ["ILoyaltyService", "IRewardService"],
    "events": [
      "loyalty.points.earned",
      "loyalty.points.redeemed",
      "loyalty.tier.changed",
      "loyalty.reward.unlocked",
      "loyalty.reward.claimed"
    ],
    "hooks": [
      "afterOrderCompleted"
    ],
    "permissions": [
      "loyalty:read",
      "loyalty:configure",
      "loyalty:manage_tiers",
      "loyalty:manage_rewards"
    ]
  },

  "tier": {
    "minimum": "professional",
    "features": {
      "professional": ["basic_points", "simple_rewards"],
      "business": ["basic_points", "simple_rewards", "tiers", "custom_rewards"],
      "enterprise": ["basic_points", "simple_rewards", "tiers", "custom_rewards", "gamification", "referrals"]
    }
  },

  "plannedFeatures": [
    "Point earning on orders",
    "Point redemption",
    "Tier-based rewards",
    "Birthday rewards",
    "Referral bonuses",
    "Achievement badges",
    "Streak rewards",
    "Custom point multipliers",
    "Points expiry management",
    "Loyalty card generation"
  ],

  "estimatedRelease": "Q3 2026"
}
